reference_templates.title: Form inside dialog

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Reference DOM (Aria-labelledby only): Email field identified only via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden span Reference DOM (Datalist autocomplete): Location field uses input list= with datalist suggestions Reference DOM (Form inside dialog): Application fields live inside a native dialog element Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: split-phone, decoy-form, table-layout, shadow-host, details-accordion. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Aria-labelledby only; Datalist autocomplete; Form inside dialog.
